channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Netanyahu authorizes direct talks with Lebanon in potential boost to ceasefire efforts - AP News
item.description:
1. Netanyahu authorizes direct talks with Lebanon in potential boost to ceasefire efforts  AP News
  2. Live updates: Netanyahu approves talks with Lebanon after Israeli strikes imperil Iran ceasefire  AP News
  3. Israeli official: No ceasefire ahead of Lebanon talks; Leiter said to lead delegation  The Times of Israel
  4. Netanyahu announces negotiations with Lebanon after U.S. pressure  Axios
  5. Israel Says It Agrees to Direct Talks With Lebanon  Bloomberg.com

item.title: European Leaders Demand That U.S. Cease-Fire With Iran Include Lebanon - The New York Times
item.description:

item.title: A deal or a mirage? Trump’s Iran ceasefire collides with chaos on the ground - CNN
item.description:
1. A deal or a mirage? Trump’s Iran ceasefire collides with chaos on the ground  CNN

  4. Iran revealed a 10-point plan for peace with the US--Here's what's in it  Fox News
  5. The cease-fire that wasn’t: Here’s why Trump and Iran never really agreed to the same terms  Fortune

item.description:

item.title: Head of IMF says Iran war will permanently scar global economy even if peace is reached - The Guardian
item.description:

item.title: Trump’s Iran war widens rift with European nationalists once viewed as MAGA allies - AP News

item.title: Greece will ban all kids under 15 from using social media - Engadget
